extracted_from: The Fund is registered for distribution to the public in the UK but not in any other jurisdiction. The sub-funds are registered for distribution to professional investors only in Ireland.
extraction_notes: El documento describe el 'Trojan Fund' con ISINs del Reino Unido (ej. GB0034243732, GB00B01BP952) y no proporciona métricas específicas para el 'Trojan Fund (Ireland)' con el ISIN IE00B6T42S66. Aunque menciona que 'sub-funds are registered for distribution to professional investors only in Ireland', no se detallan datos cuantitativos para un fondo irlandés específico.
